raw_title: From Automation to Transformation with AI-Tools: Exploring the Professional Norms and the Perceptions of Responsible AI in a News Organization
title_en: From Automation to Transformation with AI-Tools: Exploring the Professional Norms and the Perceptions of Responsible AI in a News Organization
title_zh: 从自动化到AI工具驱动的转型：探索新闻机构中的专业规范与负责任AI的认知
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了新闻机构如何从简单的自动化转向使用AI工具进行更深层次的转型。它关注记者和其他新闻工作者如何看待和使用AI，特别是他们如何理解'负责任AI'的概念，以及这如何影响他们的工作方式和专业标准。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how news organizations are moving beyond basic automation to deeper transformation using AI tools. It focuses on how journalists and other news professionals perceive and use AI, particularly their understanding of 'responsible AI,' and how this affects their work practices and professional standards.
research_direction_zh: 该研究属于媒体技术与新闻伦理交叉领域，探索AI在新闻业中的应用如何重塑专业规范、工作流程和伦理考量，为理解技术变革下的新闻实践提供实证基础。
research_direction_en: This research falls at the intersection of media technology and journalism ethics, exploring how AI applications in news organizations reshape professional norms, workflows, and ethical considerations, providing empirical insights into journalistic practices amid technological change.
